import React from "react"; import { useNavigate } from "react-router-dom"; function Home() { const navigate = useNavigate(); const features = [ { title: "Live Location Tracking", icon: "📍", desc: "Track your journey in real-time.", action: () => navigate("/journey"), }, { title: "Emergency Alerts", icon: "🚨", desc: "Send alerts instantly to parents.", action: () => navigate("/sos"), }, { title: "Police Assistance", icon: "🚓", desc: "Find the nearest police station.", action: () => navigate("/police"), }, { title: "Location Sharing", icon: "📲", desc: "Share your live location easily.", action: () => navigate("/share"), }, { title: "Safety Monitoring", icon: "🛰", desc: "Detect suspicious stops during travel.", action: () => navigate("/monitor"), }, { title: "Smart Navigation", icon: "🗺", desc: "Navigate safely using map directions.", action: () => navigate("/journey"), }, ]; return (
{/* HERO SECTION */}

Stay Safe Wherever You Go 💖

Real-time tracking, emergency alerts, and smart navigation — everything you need for a safer journey.

{/* FEATURES */}

Our Safety Features ✨

{features.map((feature, index) => (
{feature.icon}

{feature.title}

{feature.desc}

Tap to use →
))}
{/* QUICK ACTION BAR (APP FEEL) */}
); } export default Home;
